title: Phase Failure Relay Price Pakistan 2026 — Voltage Asymmetry, WAPDA Summer Sag & Motor Protection Buyer Guide
summary_html: Phase failure relay price Pakistan 2026 — PKR 800 to 18,000. Covers voltage asymmetry (the leading cause of motor burnout in Pakistan WAPDA summer), under-voltage trip settings for WAPDA feeders, auto-restart vs manual-reset for Pakistan motor applications, time delay coordination with DOL and star-delta starters, and 7 installation mistakes with PKR repair costs. Includes FAQPage JSON-LD schema with 8 questions targeting Pakistan-specific phase monitoring queries.
